response.overview: “Hiya Mate” is a well-known catchphrase and comedy routine by Liverpool stand-up comedian Paul Smith, rather than an actual song. He uses it as a casual and friendly way to open conversations with audience members during his shows, especially at the Hot Water Comedy Club. The phrase has become popular because of his relaxed, relatable style and quick-witted crowd interactions, where he turns simple greetings into funny, improvised exchanges. Clips of these moments have gone viral online, making “Hiya mate” strongly associated with his approachable, conversational comedy style.
response.title: paul smith hiya mate
